errors.userExplanation: The selected game window is no longer available.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Return to Companion health, reselect Sea of Thieves, and retry.
errors.technicalContext: The governed window handle was absent or closed.

errors.userExplanation: Windows stopped allowing the selected window to be captured.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Stop the scan, restore capture permission, and select the window again.
errors.technicalContext: The native capture provider returned a permission or source error.

errors.userExplanation: The app and Companion cannot safely understand each other.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Update the older component or return to the last compatible release.
errors.technicalContext: Companion protocol version negotiation had no supported overlap.

errors.userExplanation: The waypoint package failed its integrity checks.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Restore the last verified package or rebuild from governed Creator recordings.
errors.technicalContext: A package, artifact, size, or canonical hash did not match.
errors.privacy: The rejected package is never executed.

errors.userExplanation: This release channel requires a trusted waypoint-package signature.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Install a package signed for the selected trust scope.
errors.technicalContext: No signature was present while trusted-package mode was active.

errors.userExplanation: The selected vision provider is unavailable.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Use the displayed CPU fallback if supported or choose a compatible package.
errors.technicalContext: Provider initialization or model load did not complete.
errors.privacy: No incomplete result can verify a waypoint.

errors.userExplanation: The selected package needs more graphics memory than is available.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Use a supported lower-resource provider or close other GPU-heavy applications.
errors.technicalContext: Provider allocation exceeded the declared resource budget.
errors.privacy: Captured evidence is cleared on failure.

errors.userExplanation: The voyage moved on before this scan finished.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Return to the current story step and scan only if it still requests verification.
errors.technicalContext: The signed attempt stage token did not match authoritative current state.
errors.privacy: Only derived rejection metadata is retained.

errors.userExplanation: The target recordings could not form a reliable reference.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Record more varied, well-lit target views with stable surroundings.
errors.technicalContext: The governed reference graph or planar reconstruction failed.
errors.privacy: Creator recordings remain governed authoring assets.

errors.userExplanation: The update is not signed by a trusted release key.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Keep the current version and obtain the update from the approved channel.
errors.technicalContext: Ed25519 release metadata or Authenticode policy validation failed.
errors.privacy: No user project data is changed.

errors.userExplanation: The downloaded update is damaged or unexpected.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Discard the staged file and download it again from the approved channel.
errors.technicalContext: The artifact SHA-256 did not match signed release metadata.
errors.privacy: No user project data is changed.

errors.userExplanation: The update is waiting for the active scan or story moment to finish.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Finish or safely stop the active activity, then apply the staged update.
errors.technicalContext: Atomic activation is deferred by the active-session interlock.
errors.privacy: The staged update does not inspect gameplay frames.

errors.userExplanation: The new version did not start safely and was rolled back.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Continue on the restored version and create a metadata-only diagnostic bundle.
errors.technicalContext: Post-activation health failed before the release pointer was committed.
errors.privacy: Rollback preserves user projects and published waypoint history.

errors.userExplanation: This waypoint is not available offline on this device.
errors.recommendedRecovery: Reconnect before the story step or ask the Captain for manual recovery.
errors.technicalContext: The pinned immutable package was absent from the governed local cache.
errors.privacy: No network upload is attempted without the normal application connection.
